name: react-vite
description: Default Jarvis scaffold: React 19, Vite 7, Node 24+, Tailwind v4, Redux Toolkit, react-router v7, motion, react-hook-form + zod, react-toastify, Inter font. Build UI with semantic HTML, Tailwind utilities, and optional local components under src/components/.

imports.motion: motion/react (NOT framer-motion; import motion/AnimatePresence only in files that actually render motion.* or <AnimatePresence>)

animations.usage: Use motion's AnimatePresence for route or section transitions; match easing to your design.

styling.noConfig: There is NO tailwind.config.js or postcss.config.js. Customize via @theme blocks in src/index.css.
styling.colorTokens: The scaffold's @theme pre-defines 20 semantic color tokens — override VALUES only, never drop names: background, foreground, card, card-foreground, popover, popover-foreground, primary, primary-foreground, secondary, secondary-foreground, muted, muted-foreground, accent, accent-foreground, destructive, destructive-foreground, border, input, ring. These map to bg-background, text-foreground, bg-primary, etc.
